title: chabertia elongatula
intro: Chabertia elongatula, also known as the long-stalked chabertia or false aspen, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Chabertia elongatula include its ability to relieve coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Chabertia elongatula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall health.
